args: set -euo pipefail; codex_home="${CODEX_HOME:-$HOME/.codex}"; cache_root="$codex_home/plugins/cache/monlor-marketplace/codegraph"; [ -d "$cache_root" ] || { echo "codegraph plugin cache not found: $cache_root" >&2; exit 1; }; plugin_root="$(find "$cache_root" -mindepth 1 -maxdepth 1 -type d | sort -V | tail -n 1)"; [ -n "$plugin_root" ] || { echo "codegraph plugin version directory not found under: $cache_root" >&2; exit 1; }; exec "$plugin_root/scripts/codegraph-mcp.sh"
